projectDescription: A Python Discord bot that polls FiveM game servers and posts live player-count status embeds to a Discord channel.
keyFeatures: Polls multiple FiveM servers for live player counts via HTTP
Posts and continuously updates a Discord embed with server statuses
Supports visual line-break separators between server groups
Shows online/offline status with customizable emoji notices
Displays direct-connect links for each server
Configurable update interval and message-regeneration counter
publicApiSurface: ChannelID — Discord channel to post status updates in
Servers — list of FiveM server objects with URL, DisplayName, and Bypass fields
EmbedTitle — title string shown at the top of the Discord embed
UpdateDelay — seconds between each status refresh
CounterCap — number of updates before the channel is purged and a new message is created
PublicIP — public IP/hostname displayed in direct-connect links
ServerUpNotice — text/emoji prefix shown when a server is online
ServerDownNotice — text shown when a server is offline or unreachable
